mechanics.excerpt: yakuza gumi (clan) is involved virtually every kind of crimina venture with the notable exception of muggings and other violent street crime: it's bad business t0 brutalize your customers (though rival eumi are fair game). This respect for the common man and strict code of honor separate the yakuza from other organized crime factions the Inner Sphere Time: 106 years Attribute Thresholds: EDG +1 Tralts: In For Life, Quirk / Loyalty to Yakuza Skllls: Fast Talk +2, Streetwise Draconis Combine -2, Martial Arts; Any +2 Next Path: Ne er-Do-Well (4), Yakuza (4), Covert Ops (4), Civilian Job (4 52
